report.summary: Community growth cycle v2 (Mar 17): FOMC MEETING STARTED TODAY — Fed decides tomorrow 2pm ET; refreshed all social content with live market data (BTC $73K, Fear & Greed 15, ETF inflows $1.3B, 98.1% hold probability); FOMC Decision Day tweet is the FIRE post; 6-post FOMC deep-dive thread drafted with dot plot scenarios + contrarian signals; Telegram Trading Bots launch tweet ($24B+ Trojan volume); Virtuals Protocol AI agents tweet (17,700 agents, $480M mcap); 2 new social cards (FOMC 3-scenario + Telegram Bots top-5 comparison); Discord/Telegram triple-drop; Thursday newsletter with FOMC aftermath as lead; CRITICAL CORRECTION: Pectra shipped May 2025 — guide references stale, Glamsterdam/Hegota are 2026 upgrades.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (FIRE — post NOW): FOMC Decision Day — 'The Fed started meeting 30 minutes ago. Rate decision drops tomorrow at 2pm ET.' BTC fell after 7/8 FOMC meetings in 2025; 3 scenarios (Hawkish $65K / Neutral -2-4% / Dovish $75K+); CTA to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide. HIGHEST PRIORITY.

Tweet (Tuesday afternoon): Fear & Greed contrarian angle — 'Fear & Greed Index: 15. That's the lowest sustained reading since the 2022 bear market bottom.' ETF inflows $1.3B, perp funding negative longest since 2022, BTC up 8% in March. Last time all 3 aligned = BTC at $16K.

Tweet (Tuesday evening): Telegram Trading Bots launch — 'Trojan: $24B+. BONKbot: $14B+. Maestro: $13B+. Telegram bots now process more volume than most CEXs.' 74% Solana, fees 0.5-1%, private key custody risk; CTA to /learn/telegram-trading-bots-guide-2026.

Twitter thread (6 posts, Wed pre-FOMC): Deep dive — dot plot is what moves crypto, not the rate; 3 scenarios with BTC targets; Iran conflict + tariffs + Powell succession make this FOMC different; historical 7/8 bearish pattern; contrarian case (Fear 15 + negative funding + ETF inflows); CTA to guide.
Tweet (Wednesday post-2pm): FOMC reaction — 'The Fed just [held/cut/hiked]. Here's what that means for crypto.' Link back to FOMC guide with actual outcome context.

Tweet (Wed/Thu): Virtuals Protocol — '17,700 AI agents launched. $480M mcap. $39.5M cumulative revenue. Virtuals Protocol turned Base into the AI agent launchpad.' GAME framework, AIXBT $168M, Luna 500K TikTok; CTA to /ecosystem/virtuals-protocol.
Discord/Telegram (Tuesday): Triple drop — (1) FOMC alert with 3 scenarios, (2) Telegram Bots guide launch, (3) Virtuals Protocol deep dive. All with direct URLs.

Newsletter (Thursday Mar 19): FOMC aftermath lead story; 3 subject lines; Market pulse (BTC $73K, Fear 15, ETF $1.3B inflows); New on degen0x: FOMC guide, Hyperliquid guide, Telegram Bots, Virtuals Protocol; Featured reads: DeFAI guide, Crypto Tax guide (28 days to Apr 15); Degen Corner: contrarian case — Fear 15 + negative funding + ETF inflows historically = local bottom.

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: FOMC MEETING DAY: The Fed started its 2-day meeting today (Mar 17). Rate decision drops Mar 18 at 2pm ET. 98.1% probability of hold at 3.50-3.75%. The dot plot is the real variable — shift to 2 cuts = dovish BTC pump, shift to 0 cuts = hawkish dump to $65K.

MARKET DATA (live): BTC $73,087 (+8% March, breaking 5-month losing streak). Fear & Greed 15 (Extreme Fear, lowest sustained since 2022 bottom). ETF inflows $1.3B in March (first positive month since October). Perp funding negative longest streak since late 2022. TRUMP memecoin +30%, TAO/FET +14%.

CONTRARIAN SIGNAL: The last time Fear & Greed hit these levels AND perp funding was this negative AND ETF inflows turned positive, BTC was at $16K (late 2022). This confluence historically precedes significant rallies.

CONTENT VELOCITY: 4 pages deployed today (Hyperliquid + FOMC guides promoted from queue; Telegram Bots + Virtuals Protocol built and published). Site at 384 published pages. Queue now empty — need new content for next cycle.

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Previous community cycles referenced 'Pectra countdown T-24 (Apr 10)'. Pectra shipped on Ethereum mainnet in May 2025. The /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide needs updating to past tense. Current Ethereum upgrades: Glamsterdam (mid-2026) and Hegota (late 2026). This is a content quality issue — recommend CEO/Content Writer flag for next sprint.

Posting schedule: Tue FOMC FIRE (NOW) + Fear&Greed tweet (afternoon) + Telegram Bots (evening) + Discord triple-drop → Wed FOMC thread (pre-2pm) + reaction tweet (post-2pm) + Virtuals Protocol → Thu newsletter (FOMC aftermath lead) → Fri community poll for Sprint 59
